name: Shanghai Sinotec (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Sinotec (Group) Co., Ltd. engages in the development and production of automobile and turbocharger parts in China. The company offers bushings, turbine housings, turbocharger middle cases, turbine, and pull rods, as well as connecting and cover plate assemblies. It also provides import and export customs clearance, foreign exchange settlement, trade financing, logistics, export rebates, and other import and export services. The company also exports its products to North America and Europe. It serves automobile and turbocharger manufacturer companies. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Sinotec (Group) Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Shanghai, China.
